libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is needed. For 5.x tests, use the Jackson 3 node type returned by the generator, e.g. tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode, and register new Swagger2Module() with SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder before generating schemas.

deterministic_setup.reason: The module POM declares jsonschema-generator with provided scope, while normal usage constructs a SchemaGenerator and registers Swagger2Module; version 5.0.0 documentation recommends aligned generator/module versions.

The module POM declares swagger-annotations with provided scope, and meaningful coverage requires io.swagger.v3 annotations such as @Schema/@ArraySchema on test model classes; 2.2.41 is the version managed by the 5.0.0 parent.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Reusing 4.x test imports such as com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode will cause javac failures because jsonschema-generator 5.0.0 uses Jackson 3 packages.
If the provided-scope dependencies are omitted, generated tests may compile only shallow module instantiation or fail to resolve SchemaGenerator, JsonNode, or Swagger annotation types.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Meaningful tests require the provided-scope companion generator and Swagger annotation APIs; the module is only an add-on and its POM does not transitively provide those classes to the test scaffold.
